name: Flips Classic
description: Sun Snacks Erdnuss Flips Classic – crispy peanut puffs with a light, crunchy texture. Vegan-friendly and perfect for snacking.

specifications.Storage: Store in a cool, dry place

name: Cashew Nuts
description: Farmer Naturals Cashew Kerne – naturally sourced cashew nuts, a good source of magnesium. Resealable bag, vegan certified.

specifications.Storage: Store in a cool, dry place

name: Organic Orange Juice
description: Bio Orangensaft – 100% organic orange juice made from directly pressed oranges. Vegan, EU organic certified, 1 Litre.

name: UHT Sour Cream
description: Milsani Schmand – creamy sour cream with 24% fat content. Made in Germany without genetic engineering.

specifications.Storage: Refrigerate, use within 3 days of opening

name: Savory Beef Salami
description: Gut Bartelsheide Herzhafte Rindfleischsalami – mildly smoked beef salami of top quality. Animal welfare certified, fresh cold cuts.

specifications.Storage: Keep refrigerated, consume within 2 days of opening
